title: WHAT WE SHIP.
hero.intro: Four products. Each one generates revenue or saves time. No feature matrices.

cards.title: WHEN IT LAUNCHES
cards.description: Binary signals on real-world events. Yes or no, before it resolves. Posted to Discord, ready to trade on.

cards.title: HOW IT WORKS
cards.description: Entity corpus + news monitoring + astrological timing. Rule-based engine. No LLM hallucination. Just dates and probabilities.

cards.title: WHO IT'S FOR
cards.description: Traders who want a signal, not a sentiment analysis. Prediction market participants. Crypto macro players.

cards.title: PRICING
cards.description: $19/month for signals feed. $99/month for full entity corpus and API access.

cards.title: WHAT IT DOES
cards.description: Real voice AI makes B2B sales calls for you. Not a chatbot. Not a script. A voice that handles objection and books the meeting.

cards.title: HOW IT WORKS
cards.description: Upload your prospect list. Our voice AI calls them, has a real conversation, and books meetings directly into your calendar.

cards.title: WHO IT'S FOR
cards.description: Founders doing outbound. Sales teams that need backup. Anyone whose calendar is empty and phone won't ring.

cards.title: PRICING
cards.description: ₹8,000/month per client. First billing in 30 days.

cards.title: WHAT IT DOES
cards.description: Birth chart + company incorporation date = peak timing windows for founders and their companies. For VCs who want to know before the pitch.

cards.title: HOW IT WORKS
cards.description: Submit founder DOB + birthplace + company registration date. We run Vedic chart analysis and return timing windows — when to invest, when to expect friction.

cards.title: WHO IT'S FOR
cards.description: VC firms, angel investors, family offices making early-stage bets.

cards.title: WHAT IT DOES
cards.description: Factory maintenance calls get routed to the right technician automatically. No multi-day waits. No phone tag.

cards.title: HOW IT WORKS
cards.description: Incoming call → voice AI understands the problem → routes to the relevant technician → books the job. Owner gets an SMS confirmation.

cards.title: WHO IT'S FOR
cards.description: Factory owners with maintenance contracts. Industrial zones with fragmented technician networks.

cards.title: STATUS
cards.description: Tata Steel vendor network. In field testing.
